sentences.text_original: 你最近怎么都不出来玩？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuìjìn zěnme dōu bù chūlái wán?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Почему ты в последнее время совсем не выходишь погулять?
sentences.text_translation_en: Why haven't you been coming out to hang out lately?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我最近在学车，周末都要去驾校。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuìjìn zài xué chē, zhōumò dōu yào qù jiàxiào.
sentences.text_translation: Yaqinda haydashni o'rganyapman, dam olish kunlari avtomaktabga borishim kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я сейчас учусь водить, по выходным хожу в автошколу.
sentences.text_translation_en: I've been learning to drive lately — I have to go to the driving school on weekends.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты записался на сдачу на водительские права?
sentences.text_translation_en: Did you sign up to take the driver's license test?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，上个月报的名，现在在学科目二。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, shàng ge yuè bào de míng, xiànzài zài xué kēmù èr.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, o'tgan oy yozilganman, hozir ikkinchi bo'limni o'rganyapman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, записался в прошлом месяце, сейчас учу второй раздел.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, I signed up last month, and now I'm on test section two.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我觉得倒车入库最难，练了好多次还是不太熟。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ juéde dàochē rùkù zuì nán, liàn le hǎo duō cì háishì bú tài shú.
sentences.text_translation: Menimcha orqaga yurib mashinani joyga qo'yish eng qiyini, ko'p marta mashq qildim, baribir uncha pishiq emasman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: По-моему, заезд задним ходом самый сложный — тренировался много раз, но всё ещё не очень уверенно.
sentences.text_translation_en: I think reverse parking is the hardest — I've practiced many times and still not great at it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 有点严，但是教得很认真，是个好教练。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu diǎn yán, dànshì jiāo de hěn rènzhēn, shì ge hǎo jiàoliàn.
sentences.text_translation: Biroz talabchan, lekin juda jiddiy o'rgatadi, yaxshi murabbiy.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Немного строгий, но преподаёт очень добросовестно, хороший инструктор.
sentences.text_translation_en: A bit strict, but he teaches conscientiously — he's a good instructor.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: When do you plan to take the test?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 下个星期考科目二，希望一次能过。
sentences.pinyin: Xià ge xīngqī kǎo kēmù èr, xīwàng yí cì néng guò.
sentences.text_translation: Keyingi hafta ikkinchi bo'limni topshiraman, bir martada o'ta olishni umid qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: На следующей неделе сдаю второй раздел, надеюсь сдать с первого раза.
sentences.text_translation_en: I take section two next week — I hope I pass on the first try.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Jiāyóu! Kǎo guò le qǐng wǒ chī fàn.
sentences.text_translation: Omad! O'tib olsang meni ovqatga taklif qil.
sentences.text_translation_en: Good luck! If you pass, treat me to a meal.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 没问题！如果我过了，第一个告诉你。
sentences.pinyin: Méi wèntí! Rúguǒ wǒ guò le, dì-yī ge gàosu nǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Muammo yo'q! O'tib olsam, birinchi bo'lib senga aytaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Без проблем! Если сдам, первым делом скажу тебе.
sentences.text_translation_en: No problem! If I pass, you'll be the first to know.
sentences.speaker: B
